Indigo Historian.name: 靛蓝历史学家 Indigo Historian
Indigo Historian.description:
自从你第一次听到杰出的g’mayun历史学家蒙巴克讲述靛蓝群岛的历史起，你就一直渴望成为一名著名的历史学家，并加入享有盛誉的靛蓝群岛历史学会。你为此倾尽全力，穿梭于最负盛名的学者与贵族之间，学习更多关于靛蓝群岛隐秘的过往。

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须为智力或感知，另一项为自由能力提升。你在社群（技能）以及靛蓝群岛历史学识（技能）上为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces}技能专长。

Ever since you first heard about the history of the Indigo Isles told by the preeminent g’mayun historian Monbak, you’ve wanted to become a famous historian and join the prestigious Indigo Isles Historical Society. You’ve given your all to that cause, mingling among the most prestigious academics and nobles to learn more about the Indigo Isles’ hidden past.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Intelligence or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost. You’re trained in the Society skill, and the Indigo Isles History Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.JtjnFsOToBLnSRO9]{Courtly Graces} skill feat.

Poppy Fanatic.name: 罂粟狂热者 Poppy Fanatic
Poppy Fanatic.description:
毫无疑问：镀金海盗波比·冯·藤壶，是有史以来最伟大的英雄，不仅是在靛蓝群岛，而是在整个世界范围内。与她英勇的伙伴们并肩作战——他们每一位本身都是活的传奇——波比在靛蓝群岛的无数故事中赢得了一席之地。但他们肯定不全都只是夸张的传闻。波比是真实存在的人，她的事迹也确实发生过。有些人持怀疑态度，但你将证明这一点！与此同时，你一直用据称是波比本人使用过的训练方案来训练自己，包括在跨越屋顶的绳索上蒙眼战斗。无论你是否找到了波比传奇的真相，至少你学会了如何承受坠落。

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须为力量或敏捷，另一项为自由能力提升。你在特技技能与波比学识（技能）上为受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} 技能专长。

There’s no doubt about it: Poppy von Barnacle, the Gilded Pirate, was the greatest hero who ever lived, not just in the Indigo Isles but across the entire world. Along with her heroic companions, each a living legend in their own right, Poppy earned a place in countless stories throughout the Indigo Isles. But surely they aren’t all just tall tales. Poppy was a real person, and her deeds really happened. Some people are skeptical, but you’re going to prove it! In the meantime, you’ve been training yourself with regimens Poppy herself allegedly used, including fighting blindfolded from ropes spanning across the rooftops. Whether you find the truth of Poppy’s legend or not, at least you’ve learned how to take a fall.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Strength or Dexterity, and one is a free ability boost. You’re trained in the Acrobatics skill, and the Poppy Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.LQw0yIMDUJJkq1nD]{Cat Fall} skill feat.

Indigo Trailblazer.name: 靛蓝开拓者 Indigo Trailblazer
Indigo Trailblazer.description:
踏遍每一条小径，阅尽每一处风景。这就是靛蓝开拓者同盟的座右铭。同盟所辖的众多岛屿涵盖了所有可能的生物群系，因此同盟力求将它们尽数探索，并揭开散布于群岛各处的隐秘奥秘。你已经加入了靛蓝开拓者，尽管距离你配得上“卓绝开拓者”的阶位仍需一段时间。你希望尽快攀上那样的高度，而要做到这一点，你就需要做出一些前所未有的发现。

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须提升体质或感知，另一项为自由能力提升。你在生存（技能）以及靛蓝群岛地理学识（技能）上为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tGIXuk0XeWmG04CX]{勘察野生动物}技能专长。

Walk every trail, see every sight. That’s the motto of the Fellowship of the Indigo Trailblazers. With numerous isles covered in every possible biome, the fellowship seeks to explore them all and uncover the hidden secrets found throughout the isles. You’ve joined the Indigo Trailblazers, though it will still be some time before you are worthy of the rank of Trailblazer Superlative. You hope to reach those heights as soon as you can, and to do that, you’re going to need to make some unprecedented discoveries.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Wisdom, and one is a free ability boost. You’re trained in the Survival skill, and the Indigo Isles Geography Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tGIXuk0XeWmG04CX]{Survey Wildlife} skill feat.

Bluebell Chef.name: 蓝铃厨师 Bluebell Chef
Bluebell Chef.description:
你来自蓝铃岛，这里坐落着靛蓝群岛烹饪界有史以来最伟大的高等学府：味觉学院。无论你是刚毕业的新生，还是多年前的校友，你都曾走过那些神圣的殿堂，并运用所学在朗普兰克找到了一份厨师的工作。但你偏爱的一些独特菜肴需要奇怪的食材；对于愿意弄脏双手、外出当冒险者的厨师来说，这些食材更容易收集。于是你就这么做了。在烹饪餐食之余，你作为冒险者接些零活来收集食材，而且你知道如何用怪物部件制作各种东西。除了厨师之外，你甚至也开始以冒险者的身份获得了一点名声。

选择两个能力提升。其中一个必须用于体质或智力，另一个为自由能力提升。你在手艺（技能）与烹饪学识（技能）中为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned}技能专长。

You come from Bluebell Island, home to the greatest institution of higher learning the Indigo Isles’ culinary world has ever known: the Academy of Tastes. Whether you’re a recent graduate or an alum from long ago, you once walked those hallowed halls, and you used the knowledge to get a job as a chef in Rumplank. But some of the unique dishes you prefer require strange ingredients that are easier to gather for a chef who’s willing to get their hands dirty and go adventuring. So that’s just what you’ve done. In between cooking meals, you do odd jobs as an adventurer to gather ingredients, and you know how to make all sorts of things out of monster parts. You’ve even started to gain a bit of a reputation as an adventurer, in addition to a chef.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Intelligence, and one is a free ability boost. You’re trained in the Crafting skill, and the Cooking Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned} skill feat.

Rumplank Reveler.name: 鲁姆普兰克狂欢者 Rumplank Reveler
Rumplank Reveler.description:
朗普兰克几乎人人都喜欢一场好派对。但即便在朗普兰克这样一个派对如此受欢迎的城市里，也总得有那么一个人爱派对爱到让其他市民都显得像扫兴鬼。而在朗普兰克，那个人就是你！每当有派对、庆典、聚会或节庆时，你都在场。只要有派对活动，你就会参加——哪怕那是些通常只有小孩子才会做的小事，比如在奠基者日游行上收集花卉装饰。经历了不止几次由派对狂欢引发、最终走向冒险的酩酊大作之后，你意识到：除了爱派对之外，你其实也挺擅长这种“冒险”的事。谁能想到呢？

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须加在体质或魅力上，另一项为自由能力提升。你在社群（技能）与朗普兰克学识（技能）上为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X2jGFfLU5qI5XVot]{Streetwise}技能专长。

Most everyone in Rumplank loves a good party. But even in a city like Rumplank where parties are so popular, there has to be someone who loves parties so much that they make the other citizens look like wet blankets. And in Rumplank, that someone is you! Whenever there’s a party, celebration, shindig, or festival, you’re there. If there’s a party event, you enter, even if it’s something little kids normally do, like collecting floral arrangements at the Founder’s Day parade. After more than a few party-fueled benders that led to adventures, you realized that you’re actually kind of good at this adventuring thing, in addition to partying. Who knew?

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Constitution or Charisma, and one is a free ability boost. You’re trained in the Society skill, and the Rumplank Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.X2jGFfLU5qI5XVot]{Streetwise} skill feat.

Indigo Pirate.name: 靛蓝海盗 Indigo Pirate
Indigo Pirate.description:
你一直想成为一名海盗，总有一天你也会拥有属于自己的冒险故事，就像朗普兰克那位传奇的镀金海盗——藤壶·冯·波比！不过首先，你需要一支船员……当然，要是能有一艘船就更好了。

选择两项能力提升。其中一项必须加在敏捷或魅力上，另一项为一次自由能力提升。你在运动（技能）与航海学识（技能）方面为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iOY6YfGBaOvMNAor]{水下掠袭者}技能专长。

You’ve always wanted to be a pirate, and someday you’ll have stories of your own escapades, just like the legendary Gilded Pirate of Rumplank, Poppy von Barnacle! First, though, you’ll need a crew… and of course a ship would be nice.

Choose two ability boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Charisma, and one is a free ability boost. You’re trained in the Athletics skill, and the Sailing Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.iOY6YfGBaOvMNAor]{Underwater Marauder} skill feat.
